creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Mon Oct 28 17:11:58 2013
New Revision: 331870
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331870

Log:
  - Update to version 3.4
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  
  PR:		ports/181878
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Deleted:
  head/net/nbd-server/files/
Modified:
  head/net/nbd-server/Makefile
  head/net/nbd-server/distinfo

Modified: head/net/nbd-server/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/nbd-server/Makefile	Mon Oct 28 16:27:40 2013	(r331869)
+++ head/net/nbd-server/Makefile	Mon Oct 28 17:11:58 2013	(r331870)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	nbd
-PORTVERSION=	3.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.4
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
@@ -11,19 +11,21 @@ PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-server
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Server for the Linux network block device (nbd)
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
-USE_GNOME=	glib20
 USES=		pkgconfig
+USE_GNOME=	glib20
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-lfs --enable-syslog
 
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/nbd-server bin/nbd-trdump
-MAN1=		nbd-server.1 nbd-trdump.1
-MAN5=		nbd-server.5
-MAN8=		nbd-client.8
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/nbd-server bin/nbd-trdump \
+		man/man1/nbd-server.1.gz \
+		man/man1/nbd-trdump.1.gz \
+		man/man5/nbd-server.5.gz \
+		man/man8/nbd-client.8.gz
 
 regression-test: build
-		cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MAKE} check
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MAKE} check
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net/nbd-server/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/nbd-server/distinfo	Mon Oct 28 16:27:40 2013	(r331869)
+++ head/net/nbd-server/distinfo	Mon Oct 28 17:11:58 2013	(r331870)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (nbd-3.3.tar.bz2) = 83105718dcab9eee7ea152d6e5f4928095f0d3e21dcf92e43eef183e29a80c19
-SIZE (nbd-3.3.tar.bz2) = 515909
+SHA256 (nbd-3.4.tar.bz2) = 552a6dfdd69a13217a0c449892acf70fb3a1f0fce745c72ed6d83ee50a0a32cf
+SIZE (nbd-3.4.tar.bz2) = 582959
